items.title: Trump Praises NATO’s ‘Unity’ After Lashing Out at Allies
items.summary: Though President Trump assailed partners for not joining the war in Iran, he said he would grant Ukraine long-sought authority to make the Patriot defense system.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: US military launches fresh strikes on Iran – Middle East crisis live
items.summary: Iranian state media report explosions in several locations hours after Donald Trump threatened further military action at Nato summit US carries out another wave of strikes on I...

items.title: US launches more strikes on Iran with blasts reported in south of country
items.summary: Trump says the attacks are "retribution for yesterday's bombing of ships by Iran". Iran earlier promised strong retaliation.
